title: dicksonia anthriscifolia
intro: Dicksonia anthriscifolia, also known as the Ostrich Fern or Wheki-ponga, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues and as a natural anti-inflammatory agent. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the fronds of the Ostrich Fern are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
